description:
Hi,

One of the kitchen downlights Owen fitted three weeks ago has started flickering. Everything else is grand. Could someone pop back?

Thanks
subject: Warranty — downlight flickering after install

description:
Hi,

The new garage socket works but the faceplate is sitting a little proud of the wall. Minor, but flagging it for the snag list.

Thanks
subject: Snag — socket added in garage

description:
Hi,

Can't figure out how to change the come-on time on the outdoor light you installed. Could someone talk me through it or call out?

Thanks
subject: Callback — outdoor light timer settings

description:
Hi,

Our landlord is looking for the completion certificate for the consumer unit upgrade you did last month. Can you send it on?

Thanks
subject: Completion cert request for landlord

description:
Hi,

The dimmer in the sitting room has started a faint buzz. Was fine after the install. Under guarantee I think?

Thanks
subject: Warranty — dimmer switch buzzing

description:
Hi,

Quick one: the new board isn't labelled and I can't tell which breaker is the immersion. Can someone confirm or relabel?

Thanks
subject: Label query — consumer unit upgrade

description:
Hi,

Wired doorbell stopped working since the rewire. Might be the transformer? Whenever suits.

Thanks
subject: Callback — doorbell transformer
